response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with ~14 years of experience, but the role calls for a Director-level individual contributor with 15+ years and recognized AI expertise. The resume shows only recent, limited exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling at re:cinq) and no evidence of strategic advisory work, cloud/AI platform leadership, or recognized AI products. Title, scope, and depth fall well short of a Principal/Director IC profile.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and infra
Some recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
Community contributions: workshops, talks, open-source GIS platform, and test tooling
concerns: No demonstrated Director-level IC scope, strategy advisory, or executive influence
AI/ML expertise is shallow and recent; no published AI products, platforms, or research
Cloud depth is limited (some AWS CDK); no evidence of large-scale cloud platform strategy

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI strategy and recognized AI expertise
Seniority mismatch vs. Director-level IC bar
